nodes.name: White-throated sierra finch
nodes.summary: The white-throated sierra finch (Idiopsar erythronotus) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Bolivia, Chile, and Peru where its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical high-altitude grassland. References

nodes.name: 玻利維亞
nodes.summary: 玻利維亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联770种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、北山䳍、白腹拟䳍等770种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC

nodes.name: Idiopsar
nodes.summary: Idiopsar（Idiopsar）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Red-backed sierra finch、White-throated sierra finch、白翅迪卡雀。
